clusters.label: Motion
clusters.description: Movement, travel, traversal, or change of location.

clusters.label: Stability
clusters.description: Standing, remaining, persistence, or stable posture.

clusters.label: Guidance
clusters.description: Leading, directing, bringing, or guided transport.

clusters.label: Cognition
clusters.description: Knowing, thinking, understanding, or mental processing.

clusters.label: Speech
clusters.description: Speaking, naming, expression, or verbal communication.

clusters.label: Transformation
clusters.description: Changing state, becoming, shaping, or alteration.

clusters.label: Perception
clusters.description: Seeing, hearing, sensing, or receiving impressions.

clusters.label: Possession
clusters.description: Holding, having, obtaining, or ownership relations.

clusters.label: Creation
clusters.description: Making, producing, generating, or bringing into existence.

clusters.label: Dissolution
clusters.description: Ending, breaking, dispersal, loss, or disappearance.
